overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Batman walking across a rain-soaked elevated bridge in a dark, gothic city at night. The character moves from an industrial area with bright spotlights toward an open bridge where pedestrians are visible in the distance, with the iconic Gotham city skyline visible through the storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial bridge entrance with bright spotlights

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position near the spotlights

agents.ego_description: Batman begins walking forward along the rain-soaked rooftop, cape flowing behind him as he moves away from the bright lights

entered.detail: large stone archway with two towers spanning the bridge in the background
intense white spotlights creating lens flare and illuminating the falling rain
small dark utility building with sloped roof on the right side of the bridge
orange traffic cone visible on the wet concrete surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Batman standing near intense spotlights on an industrial bridge. The character begins walking forward, passing a small utility shed on the right, with a large stone archway dominating the background. The area is soaked with rain and illuminated by artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway bridge with panoramic city views

events.description: exits the industrial archway area into the open bridge with panoramic city skyline views
moves out of the bright spotlight glare into more evenly distributed city ambient light

agents.ego_description: continues walking steadily along the open bridge, passing construction barricades while the city skyline becomes visible ahead

entered.detail: construction barriers with diagonal yellow and black stripes blocking off sections of the bridge
large metal gantry framework spanning across the bridge overhead
distant illuminated gothic buildings and spires visible through the rain and mist

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the industrial area onto an open bridge with expansive views of the gothic city skyline. Yellow and black construction barricades line the right side while a large highway sign structure looms ahead. The lighting shifts from harsh spotlights to ambient city glow as rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge pedestrian walkway with distant figures

events.description: group of pedestrians becomes visible ahead standing on the bridge walkway
character walks past the group of pedestrians on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaches and walks past a group of pedestrians standing on the bridge, continuing toward the distant city

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing on the bridge walkway

entered.detail: tall street lamps lining the left edge of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Batman walking along the open bridge toward a group of pedestrians standing ahead. The character passes the NPCs on the right while the highway sign structure recedes to the left. The gothic city skyline remains visible in the distance through the rainy night, with street lights lining the bridge edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Batman progresses from a confined industrial zone into an expansive, rain-swept urban bridge overlooking a gothic skyline. It begins with the character walking past intense spotlights and a small utility shed, moving beneath the shadow of a dominating stone archway. As he emerges from this industrial area, the scene opens up to reveal yellow and black construction barricades and a looming highway sign, while the harsh artificial lighting shifts into a moody ambient city glow. The camera then continues forward along the open bridge, passing a group of pedestrians on the right as the highway structure recedes into the distance. Finally, the movement settles into a steady pace toward the distant, rain-blurred skyline of the city, flanked by a line of glowing street lights.
